Call ID: EXT-029
Type: external
Date: 2026-04-23
Topic: Quarterly Business Review
Participants: Naomi (account manager); Jonas (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Naomi): Hi Jonas, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Jonas): We want to align on goals and success metrics for next quarter.
AM (Naomi): I've prepared a scorecard of your key metrics and wins.
Customer (Jonas): That would help. Our leadership pays close attention to this.
AM (Naomi): Let's set two or three concrete goals we can track together.
Customer (Jonas): Great session — my team is going to be thrilled with this.
AM (Naomi): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
